sentences.arabic: صَلَاحُ الدِّينِ الأَيُّوبِيُّ مِنَ الأَبْطَالِ الَّذِينَ يَتَقَاطَعُ فِيهِمُ الْإِيمَانُ وَالشَّجَاعَةُ وَالشَّهَامَةُ، وَقَدْ عُرِفَ بِعَدَالَتِهِ حَتَّى مَعَ خُصُومِهِ.
sentences.translation: Salahudin Ejubi spada u heroje u kojima se sijeku iman, hrabrost i plemenitost, a bio je poznat po pravičnosti čak i prema protivnicima.
sentences.translationEn: Salah al-Din al-Ayyubi is among the heroes in whom faith, courage, and nobility intersect, and he was known for his justice even towards his opponents.

sentences.arabic: لَمَّا فَتَحَ الْقُدْسَ عَامَ خَمْسَةٍ وَثَمَانِينَ وَخَمْسِمِائَةٍ مِنَ الْهِجْرَةِ أَظْهَرَ مِنَ الرَّأْفَةِ بِالسُّكَّانِ مَا أَبْهَرَ الْأَعْدَاءَ قَبْلَ الأَصْدِقَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Kada je 585. g. h. oslobodio Kudus, pokazao je takvo milosrđe prema stanovnicima da je zapanjilo neprijatelje prije prijatelja.
sentences.translationEn: When he liberated Jerusalem in 585 AH, he showed such compassion towards the inhabitants that it astonished enemies before friends.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يُصَلِّي صَلَاةَ الْجَمَاعَةِ وَيَسْهَرُ عَلَى قِرَاءَةِ الْعِلْمِ وَلَا يَتَوَانَى عَنِ الاِسْتِشَارَةِ فِي الْأَمُورِ الدِّينِيَّةِ وَالدُّنْيَوِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Klanjao je džemat, noćima čitao ilm i nije oklijevao da se savjetuje o vjerskim i svjetovnim pitanjima.
sentences.translationEn: He used to pray in congregation, stay up studying knowledge at night, and did not hesitate to consult on religious and worldly matters.

sentences.arabic: يَرَى الْمُؤَرِّخُونَ أَنَّ قُوَّتَهُ كَانَتْ مُسْتَمَدَّةً مِنْ تَمَسُّكِهِ بِشَرِيعَةِ اللهِ وَمِنْ تَرَاحُمِهِ مَعَ رَعِيَّتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Historičari smatraju da je njegova snaga crpla iz privrženosti Allahovom šerijatu i iz milosrđa prema podanicima.
sentences.translationEn: Historians believe that his strength was drawn from his adherence to Allah's law and from his mercy towards his subjects.

sentences.arabic: يَبْقَى صَلَاحُ الدِّينِ رَمْزًا حَيًّا لِلْقِيَادَةِ الإِسْلَامِيَّةِ الَّتِي تَجْمَعُ بَيْنَ الإِيمَانِ وَالْحَكَمَةِ وَالرَّحْمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Salahudin ostaje živim simbolom islamskog vodstva koje spaja iman, mudrost i milosrđe.
sentences.translationEn: Salah al-Din remains a living symbol of Islamic leadership that combines faith, wisdom, and compassion.
